messages.subject: Got 500 units Nature's Bounty D3
messages.body: Hey, I've got 500 units of Nature's Bounty D3 5000 IU 240ct. Can do $4.20/unit. Good til March 12. Let me know ASAP, got another buyer interested.

messages.body: We're clearing out 300 units of Dove Deep Moisture Body Wash 24oz 6-packs. Price is $5.80 per 6-pack. Product is in great condition, long expiry. Can hold until March 14. Let me know if you want photos of the lot.

messages.body: I have 1000 units of Energizer MAX AA 48-packs. Looking to move them quick at $6.50/unit. Expiry on the batteries is 2032. Need answer by tomorrow. Can deliver to your warehouse.

messages.body:
